description: L-sized feature: TransferFunds with validation, atomicity, concurrency safety, and multi-layer testing

expected_tdd_phases.red: Service tests first (transfer logic, insufficient balance, self-transfer), then handler tests (HTTP contract)
expected_tdd_phases.green: Implement with transaction boundary in repo, validation in service
expected_tdd_phases.refactor: Extract validateRequest(), extract applyTransfer(), simplify error paths

expected_killer_hypothesis: insufficient balance allows negative balance because check happens after debit
